reviews.review_description: Cool cyberpunk world and fun driving overall. The city atmosphere and neon visuals are really nice, and it’s enjoyable to explore once you get moving. A few small bugs and some unclear objectives at the start, but still a good experience and worth checking out.
As it is early access for this game, there is still an improvement in the future. At this stage, I enjoy driving!! But I hope that more missions can be provided and the city map can be bigger later.

reviews.review_title: Great driving but could use some polish
reviews.review_description: The driving is fun but there could be some more maps and comfort features
It's got some things it needs to work on but I can definitely see the potential. Lovely driving mechanics.

Gameplay
 The driving mechanics are enjoyable and engaging, delivering a solid foundation for a compelling VR experience. However, I noticed that the steering control feels somewhat limited—you can’t physically hold the steering wheel, which reduces immersion. Including a virtual steering wheel interaction could enhance realism considerably.

Visuals
 The visuals are appealing and well-rendered, capturing the neon-lit atmosphere of a cyberpunk city quite effectively. That said, the outside environment feels a bit sparse, especially beyond the city limits. Enriching peripheral environments with more visual elements—like background scenery, ambient traffic, or dynamic lighting—could help deepen the immersion.

Performance
 Performance is smooth and impressively stable. I encountered no lag, stuttering, or loading issues. This stability is critical in VR and greatly enhances comfort and enjoyment.

Overall Experience
 Overall, the concept is strong and offers a great starting point for future expansion. One point that stood out: after teleporting, users often appear facing walls or other objects, which can be disorienting. It would be more intuitive if the destination orientation matched where the user was looking, easing transitions and improving comfort.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the thoughtful review! We’re glad you enjoyed the gameplay, visuals, and smooth performance in CyberZero X: Night City Driving. 🚗✨ We’re already working on improvements like steering interactions, richer environments, and better teleport orientation to boost immersion. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: CyberZero X: Night City Driving is an unpolished gem with great potential. I would recommend keeping a close eye on it, because I see it going places and, with a bit more of that polish, becoming one of the must-plays on the oculus store.

developer_response.body: Thanks for seeing the potential in CyberZero X: Night City Driving!  We’re working on more polish and updates to make it a must-play on the Quest Store

reviews.review_title: Fun VR Driving with Great Potential
reviews.review_description: City Driving runs smoothly on Quest 2 and offers a fun, stable VR driving experience. The music is excellent, and the city has a great vibe. I’m excited to see more environmental detail, mission variety, and added driving immersion in future updates it’s already enjoyable, and I can’t wait to see where it goes next

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback!  We’re glad you enjoy the smooth driving, music, and vibe in CyberZero X. More missions, details, and immersion updates are on the way!

reviews.review_description:
This game is absolutely phenomenal!!!!
The cars, the perfectly chosen music, and the immersive cyberpunk environment all create an incredible dynamic that completely pulls you into the action. 🎵✨ The graphics, especially the wet asphalt reflections, are stunningly well-executed. 💯 The NPCs are just perfect for the genre. Thank you for creating such an amazing game! 🙏

developer_response.body: Wow—thank you! We’re thrilled you’re loving the cars, music, and cyberpunk vibe in CyberZero X: Night City Driving. More adrenaline-fueled updates are coming soon!
